prompt: From the same informational article about how a honeybee colony works, author a c1-t9 Task Model 1 (Multiple Choice) item asking which sentence best states the central idea of the passage (dimension central-idea, standard ri-2). Distractors are true-but-not-central: a too-narrow supporting detail, a too-broad overgeneralization, an insignificant minor detail, and a misread of the bees' roles.
